title: [Nyessem, Ring Loop]
description: This portion of the tunnel is spare, lacking the decoration or amenities of other sections.  Along the room's edges, where the floor and wall connect, the room's slight downslope carries the water in twin stone fountains toward the west.  Alongside each of the fountain's halves, hooded figures periodically gesture with the flow of water, as if indicating that guests should continue in that direction.
